## Current State

- **Stack:** Rails 5 / Postgres 11 / Redis 4
- **Scale:** 491 services, 48 TB data
- **Traffic:** 9601 req/s peak

## Success Criteria

- P99 latency ≤ current baseline + 10%
- Zero data loss (verified via checksum reconciliation)
- All integration tests green for 7 consecutive days
- Canary rollout without customer-reported regressions
